paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close and a 36.32 percent decrease over a window of 20 sessions. The price data is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's zero revenue and significant loss, as well as its expected signing of binding agreements with tenants over the next year.

The company has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms, with the most recent 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
